entry: TBD — Waiting for Kill Zone confirmation (NY AM 08:30-11:00 ET)
data_source: Yahoo Finance browser extraction (TradingView MCP + Alfred MT5 both offline)

narrow.status: BROKEN BELOW — price at 29,220 is 384.87 pts below range low

smt_divergence.at_highs: BEARISH SMT — NDX made HH (30,587→30,643) but GSPC made LH (7,621→7,578)
smt_divergence.at_lows: No SMT — both NDX and GSPC made HL (28,197→29,605 / 7,238→7,403)
smt_divergence.interpretation: Bearish SMT at the highs signals underlying weakness — NDX pushed to new high but GSPC failed to confirm. This divergence preceded the current selloff.

three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 bearish structure confirmed: 3 consecutive LH+LL candles (Jun 22-24). Price broke below narrow dealing range (Jun 17 SL 29,604.93). Jun 24 candle is Doji-like (body 17.2%, balanced wicks) showing indecision rather than strong bearish momentum. Bearish SMT at highs (NDX HH + GSPC LH). Price at 29,220 is 41.8% of wide range (discount). Key support: Jun 9 swing low 28,197.
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4_context: H4 data unavailable (TradingView MCP offline). D1 context: price broke below Jun 17-22 range and is now approaching the Jun 9/10 demand zone (28,197-28,463). Wide range 61.8% Fib at 29,131 was tested on Jun 24 (low 28,963 dipped below it). Overhead resistance: 29,605 (broken range low), 30,001 (narrow 61.8%), 30,124 (narrow 50%).
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15_entry: M15 data unavailable (TradingView MCP offline). Pre-market NQ futures +2.15% gap UP creates conflict with bearish D1 structure. Wait for NY AM Kill Zone (08:30-11:00 ET) for entry confirmation. Key question: does the gap fill (drop to ~29,220) or does price rally into the 29,600-30,000 overhead supply zone?

weekly_profile.tue: Jun 23: BEARISH (-21.98 pts body) — gap down from Mon close
weekly_profile.wed: Jun 24: BEARISH (-108.34 pts body) — Doji-like, indecision
weekly_profile.pattern: 3 consecutive bearish candles, no Tuesday low/high, no Wednesday reversal
weekly_profile.profile: Seek & Destroy or Potential Thursday Reversal
weekly_profile.notes: After 3 bearish days, Thursday could produce: (a) continuation bearish, or (b) Thursday reversal (London low → NY manipulation → afternoon rally). Pre-market gap up suggests potential for (b), but D1 structure is firmly bearish.

reasoning: D1 structure is clearly bearish: 3 consecutive LH+LL candles, price broke below the Jun 17-22 dealing range, and bearish SMT at the highs (NDX HH + GSPC LH) signaled weakness before the selloff. However, the Jun 24 candle is Doji-like (17.2% body, balanced wicks) showing indecision rather than strong bearish follow-through. Price at 29,220 is in the discount zone of the wider Jun 9-22 range (41.8%), approaching the Jun 9 swing low at 28,197 which is critical support. Pre-market NQ futures are +2.15% gap UP, creating a CONFLICT between bearish D1 structure and bullish pre-market momentum. This is a structure-vs-momentum conflict (pitfall lesson) — confidence lowered to 55. ICT weekly profile: after 3 bearish days, Thursday could produce a reversal, but the reversal needs confirmation. Key risk: if gap-up fails at 29,600-30,000 overhead supply, bears retain control. If gap-up holds and breaks 29,750 (Jun 23 high), the bearish thesis weakens significantly.

verification.result: All Fib levels, swing points, market structure transitions, candle deconstruction, and SMT divergence verified correct. 4 false positives in 0%/100% endpoint labeling (formula uses retracement convention, labels use position convention — both are correct within their own framework).
